name: pre-commit: hook entry uses language:script + entry pointing to rubric/runner.sh so `pre-commit install` wires it correctly
command: grep -E "language: script|language: system" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/ci/pre-commit-hooks.yaml" 1>&2 && grep -E "entry:.*rubric/runner.sh" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/ci/pre-commit-hooks.yaml" 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
